title: Ruby Hall Clinic is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ruby Hall Clinic is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!
